title: drosanthemum crassum
intro: Drosanthemum crassum, also known as the shrubby iceplant, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Drosanthemum crassum can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in topical applications for its medicinal properties.
